ExternalServiceRegistration.description: Smear climbing app GraphQL endpoint. Provides live climber performance data: working grade, send rate, flash rate, archetype, style breakdown, plateau weeks, and days since last session.
ExternalServiceRegistration.label: Smear GraphQL
ExternalServiceRegistration.schema: openapi: "3.0.0" info: title: Smear GraphQL API version: "1.0" description: | GraphQL-over-HTTP endpoint for the Smear climbing app. All operations use POST with a JSON body containing query and variables. The climberProfile query returns live performance data self-reported by the climber. Treat this data as the ground truth for what the athlete actually logged. servers: - url: https://smear-backend.onrender.com paths: /graphql: post: operationId: executeGraphQL summary: Execute a GraphQL query against Smear athlete data requestBody: required: true content: application/json: schema: type: object required: - query properties: query: type: string description: GraphQL query string variables: type: object description: GraphQL variables map responses: "200": description: GraphQL response content: application/json: schema: type: object properties: data: type: object description: Query result data errors: type: array items: type: object properties: message: type: string
